runs.brief_en: Early June 22 (Taipei): Musk marked Father's Day with family posts, pushed UK grooming-gang/media-coverage critiques (RT + 💯), demoed Grok Imagine, quoted skepticism on puberty blockers vs social-media age rules, boosted a California Starlink launch, and shared lighter video and history takes.
runs.brief_zh: 台北6/22凌晨：馬斯克父親節發文、轉推並認同英國性侵醜聞與媒體雙標評論、展示Grok Imagine、質疑青春期阻斷與社群年齡規定矛盾、轉推加州Starlink發射，並分享影片與歷史趣談。

items_flat.title_en: Musk amplifies UK grooming-gang and media double-standard critiques
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推並認同英國性侵醜聞與媒體雙標批評
items_flat.summary_en: Musk retweeted Darth Powell's post contrasting Edinburgh knife-attack terrorism coverage with silence on alleged mass grooming of British girls, then replied "💯" hours later. The post drew heavy engagement on X.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 Darth Powell 對比愛丁堡持刀案被定調恐攻、卻對據稱大規模性侵英國女童醜聞沉默的貼文，數小時後回覆「💯」，引發大量互動。

items_flat.title_en: Musk retweets Falcon 9 Starlink launch from California
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推加州 Falcon 9 Starlink 發射
items_flat.summary_en: Musk retweeted SpaceX's post announcing Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink satellites from California, amplifying the mission to his followers without added commentary.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 SpaceX 宣布 Falcon 9 從加州發射 24 顆 Starlink 衛星的貼文，未加評論便向粉絲傳播任務消息。

items_flat.title_en: Musk posts Father's Day tributes to family and Karl Marx's dad
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克父親節向家人與馬克思父親致意
items_flat.summary_en: After Taipei midnight, Musk replied with a heart emoji to his mother Maye Musk's Father's Day post, then quote-posted a letter from Karl Marx's father with "Karl's Dad was cool."
items_flat.summary_zh: 台北時間跨日後，馬斯克以愛心回覆母親 Maye Musk 的父親節貼文，並引用馬克思父親的信件寫道「卡爾他爸很酷」。

items_flat.title_en: Musk demos Grok Imagine with dancing kittens video prompt
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克展示 Grok Imagine 跳舞手套小貓影片
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted a Grok Imagine-generated video of mitten-wearing kittens dancing and singing, sharing the full prompt and telling followers "Your kids will love this video!"
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克發布 Grok Imagine 生成的戴手套小貓跳舞唱歌影片，附上完整提示詞並稱「你的孩子會愛這部影片！」
items_flat.musk_quote: Your kids will love this video! Grok Imagine prompt: The kittens with mittens start dancing and singing "we're kittens with mittens"
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 你的孩子會愛這部影片！Grok Imagine 提示詞：戴手套的小貓開始跳舞唱歌「我們是戴手套的小貓」

items_flat.title_en: Musk: blocking puberty at 11 but allowing social media makes no sense
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：11歲可阻斷青春期卻限制社群年齡「毫無道理」
items_flat.summary_en: Quote-posting educator Katharine Birbalsingh's criticism that children can block puberty at 11 yet are told to avoid social media until 16, Musk wrote simply: "Makes no sense."
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克引用教育者批評「11歲可阻斷青春期、卻要到16歲才能上社群媒體」的荒謬對比，只寫了一句：「毫無道理。」

items_flat.title_en: Musk shares Charlie Kirk legacy conversion video
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克分享 Charlie Kirk 遺產改變人生影片
items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted a video from Soldiersgirl about a man who said he was glad Charlie Kirk was murdered, then admitted Kirk's content changed his life and reconciled his family — amplifying it without added text.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克引用 Soldiersgirl 影片：一名男子曾稱樂見 Charlie Kirk 遇害，後承認 Kirk 內容改變其人生並促成家庭和解，馬斯克未加文字便轉發。

items_flat.title_en: Musk jokes electric rockets are impossible
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克開玩笑：電動火箭不可能
items_flat.summary_en: Replying to a discussion thread, Musk quipped "Unfortunately, electric rockets are impossible" — a characteristic physics joke amid his space-focused timeline activity.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克在討論串回覆「不幸的是，電動火箭不可能」，以典型物理梗穿插在太空相關動態中。
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 不幸的是，電動火箭不可能

items_flat.title_en: Musk reacts "Wow" to viral video clip
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克對爆紅影片回應「哇」
items_flat.summary_en: Musk posted a one-word reaction — "Wow" — amplifying a video from Thaïs d'Escufon that quickly racked up millions of views.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克對 Thaïs d'Escufon 的影片只寫「哇」便轉發，該帖迅速累積數百萬瀏覽。

items_flat.title_en: Musk muses on William the Conqueror invasion timing
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克談威廉征服者入侵時機
items_flat.summary_en: In a late-night reply to Joe Lonsdale, Musk said he loves niche history and argued William the Conqueror would probably have lost had he invaded a year earlier — "timing is everything."
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克深夜回覆 Joe Lonsdale，稱自己熱愛小眾歷史，並認為威廉征服者若早一年入侵可能會敗——「時機就是一切」。
items_flat.musk_quote: True! I love niche history. Timing is everything. William would probably have lost if he had invaded a year earlier.
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 沒錯！我熱愛小眾歷史。時機就是一切。威廉若早一年入侵，大概會落敗。
